headlines.summary: India’s power sector is set to grow by 5-6% each year in the medium term as investments in both thermal and renewable power generation are projected to surge amid growing demand from electrification, data centers, cooling demand, and manufacturing, according to Citi. headlines.title: Europe’s Dependence on U.S. LNG Is Set to Surge
headlines.summary: The European Union’s dependence on liquefied natural gas from the United States is set to rise significantly, reaching 80% of all LNG imports in two years, the Institute for Energy Economics and Financial Analysis has warned. headlines.title: Chinese Oil Tanker Tests Safe Passage Through Strait of Hormuz
headlines.summary: A Chinese tanker is attempting to cross the Strait of Hormuz, Bloomberg reported today, citing ship-tracking data showing the VLCC moving south along the eastern side of the chokepoint. headlines.title: Canada’s Economy Caught Between Oil Windfalls and Trade Wars
headlines.summary: A recent Bank of Canada Market Participants Survey has flagged geopolitical and trade tensions as the biggest risks facing the Canadian economy.
